sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68903" key="mousomani/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουσο-μᾰνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n68903.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">devotion to the Muses</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.706c</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
